claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A Living Green/Violet decorative spinner plus a named aria-busy region with independently optional shared-announcer transitions.
semantics: Spinner is always aria-hidden and unfocusable, never owns an accessible loading name, and remains independent from Skeleton geometry or busy ownership.
BusyRegion owns role=region and aria-busy and requires exactly one of label or labelledBy; it never renders a live descendant inside the aria-busy subtree.

Announcements are opt-in and require a nearest ScreenReaderAnnouncer.Provider. Mounting an active announcing region or transitioning it from inactive to active enqueues one polite summary; identical restarts use the provider dedupe window.
Provider-owned persistent live roots render after provider content, outside the named busy region, and static or completed states make no announcement.
Reduced motion replaces rotation with a distinct static glyph.
announce=false removes the announcement effect and event while retaining only the named aria-busy region.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: Animation is removed while static text, shape, native state, and reserved layout remain authoritative.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
